response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in C++ (as seen in National Instruments role) but lacks recent, relevant C++ experience in capital markets or fixed income domains. Their background is primarily in web/mobile development, AI-agent infrastructure, and embedded systems, with no demonstrated experience in SQL Server/Oracle, fixed income systems, or Windows platform development. Domain expertise is not met, and mandatory C++ experience is not current.
strengths: Strong problem-solving and software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD)
Proficient in multiple languages and platforms, indicating adaptability
concerns: No recent C++ experience in capital markets/fixed income (last C++ role was 2015)
Lacks mandatory domain expertise in fixed income or investment banking
No experience with SQL Server/Oracle or messaging frameworks (Kafka/MQ)
